title: sickboy pack
description:
A modpack for SMPs.
Focused mostly on survival, adventure and automation thru the create mod.
healthpoints are gained by mining crystals and mobs are difficult.
body:
Survival focused "hard" modpack for SMPs, with hints of automation and RPG elements.
Features local VOIP, darkness, smarter and better mobs, rebalnced gameplay mechanics aswell as some world generation mods and enhanced graphical features. Perfect for those who want a fresh but still very vanilla+ experience.

NOTABLE FEATURES:
1.Heart crystals used for increasing HP (similar to terraria)
2.Darkness based on moon cycles
3.Reworked respawn mechanics with gravestones and randomization
4.Grappling hooks and aircraft for traversal and exploration
5.Haephestus (better known as Tinkers construct)
6.Navigation based on landmarks and a comapss(no coords ;3)
7.Create mod for automation

[#WARNING]
Thgis pack is not yet complete and may have some jank, it will continue to get updates and new features over time so make sure to update the pack when prompted![only for real gamers]
